applied_optimizations.name: FP8 prefill attention for radix-cache path
applied_optimizations.description: Added FP8 prefill support in the radix-cache (prefix) branch of forward_extend. When _use_fp8_prefill_attn is true and kv_b_proj uses MXFP4 weights (uint8 dtype), uses fused_gemm_afp4wfp4_split_cat to fuse GEMM + split + cat operations producing FP8 k/v directly. Casts q/k_pe to FP8, calls mla_prefill_ps_asm_fwd + mla_reduce_v1 for FP8 attention. Falls back to BF16 flash_attn_varlen_func when PS metadata is not available. Also imported fused_gemm_afp4wfp4_split_cat and dynamic_mxfp4_quant from aiter.

notes: Changes were already applied from a previous trial - all 4 test harness checks pass
The non-radix path already had FP8 prefill via _use_fp8_prefill_attn flag
The radix-cache path (elif layer.qk_head_dim != kv_lora_rank+qk_rope_head_dim) now mirrors that FP8 logic
fused_gemm_afp4wfp4_split_cat avoids extra element-wise casts by fusing GEMM with split+cat into FP8 output
